system.description: Flamethrowers consist of three parts: a tank filled with a liquid fuel and a gas propellant, a long nozzle with an ignition source at the end, and someone willing to set other people on fire. Flamethrowers apply the Burning condition on a successful attack instead of a Wound. Ammunition is measured in bursts. Each tank has 9 bursts worth of fuel. Flamethrowers cannot use the normal attack action, only the Burst Fire, Sustained Fire, and Field of Fire actions.
